- Deskripsi Visual: A yellow, smiling round emoji-like face with large blue sunglasses is shown centered against a black background, with two gray-white hand shapes giving a thumbs-up and a fist near the left side.

The main subject is the stylized yellow face with closed eyelids, thick dark blue circular sunglasses, a wide white tooth-filled grin, and small raised eyebrows indicated by darker yellow shapes above the glasses; on the left side a gray-white hand with fingers curled is raised near the face, and on the right side a gray-white hand makes a thumbs-up gesture.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a simple graphic on a solid black background, with no other environmental elements visible.

Visual Details:
The face is centered and dominates the composition, rendered in a cartoon style with smooth shading. The sunglasses are dark blue with rounded lenses and a thick dark blue frame. The teeth are rectangular and white with gray lines between them. The hands are light gray-white with joint lines, outlined slightly with darker shading, floating at the left and right edges of the image.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a smiling yellow emoji-like face wearing dark blue sunglasses. Two gray-white hand icons flank it, one near the left side and one giving a thumbs-up on the right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
